ab: I luma’ tu haw ci vayi?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Ira tu, mavuti’ay cira i kakavutian.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: I luma’ tu haw ci vayi?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Awaay, makatahkal cira, u lavii tu a taluma’.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: I luma’ tu haw ci vaki?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: Ira tu cira i sakatusa a tatungruhan, katakudul isaw!
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧!
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: Ira haw ku i luma’ay?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Ci Kacaw haw, matenes tu a caay pakamelaw itisuwan, mamaan tu saw kisu?
ch: B:是Kacaw啊，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Kacaw. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: Kapah tu isaw! u tayniayay kaku a masasuwasuwal itisuwan.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: Icuwa ci ama isu?
en: Where is your father?

ab: Ira i aniva cira a misacacak, angangen aku cira.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: Talacuwa saw ci Panay?
en: Where did Panay go?

ab: Tayra i paruvuan cira a mireper tu ayam.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: Vaki, initu kami.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: Awaay i luma’ ci vaki namu, ira i umah cira, ka i luma’ han tu a mitala tu nikataluma’ nira.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: Amaaw, ini tu haw kisu!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: Matenes tu a caay pakamelaw, mavatacay tu kisu.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: Lipahak ku valucu’ tu nikatayni nu misu.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: U sapaveli itamuwan kina paringad, pateli han tu i pinsiyang.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: Matenesay tu a caay katayni, angangngaw nu maku ku heni a makumud kita a malavi.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃晚餐。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: Hamanan aca, kaw ociya han tu, ini tu kita i palavangan a masasuwasuwal.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: A taluma’ tu kaku haw, aray.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: Makahnipacukan kina ayam, u sapataluma’ nu misu kiniyan.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
